title: Fix broken link in node on parameterized class typedef

features.name: parameterized class typedef accessed via scope resolution
features.description: Code should include a typedef of a parameterized class defined inside another parameterized class, accessed using the scope resolution operator

features.name: parameterized class with rand members and type parameters
features.description: Code should include a parameterized class with rand logic members using type parameters for bit width

features.name: package with parameterized classes and cross-class typedef
features.description: Code should include a package containing two parameterized classes where one class typedefs the other
